hooks.command: f="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}/.claude/hooks/harness-dispatch.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then python3 "$f"; fi
f="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}/.claude/hooks/stop-evidence-gate.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then python3 "$f"; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 99 ] && exit 2; fi; exit 0
